changelog.1.12.9: Fixed Live Game Screen layout: team names now display properly (left-aligned with max-width), score centered in header, CSS improved for game-score spacing; Stop button now uses modal dialog similar to End Game (instead of browser confirm), period finish functionality added with automatic gameTime increment and period counter; injured players now display as faint dark grey tile (opacity 0.6, #9e9e9e) to distinguish from red cards, injury action removed from action removal reverts properly
changelog.1.12.8: Fixed Live Game Screen: team scores now properly centered and aligned left/right with opponent name, Stop button now triggers 'period finished' popup (ends game if last period), added injury action button (#🏥) that makes player unavailable like red card, improved action review dialog to allow removing previously recorded actions with revert of stats, fixed period scores display in report showing individual period breakdowns (P1 X-Y, P2 X-Y, etc)
changelog.1.12.7: Fixed: Report header formatting - team scores now properly centered with flexbox, period scores display format improved (P1: X-Y on separate lines for clarity), removed sticky header positioning, added contrasting light-blue background (#f0f4f8) to timeline chart for better visibility, significantly reduced spacing between report sections (margins 25px→12px, padding 20px→16px), CSS file optimized removing 124 lines of redundant code and dead styles
changelog.1.12.6: Fixed: Report header scores now perfectly centered under team names, period display intelligently shows all periods for 4+ period games (P1: X-Y | P2: X-Y | P3: X-Y | P4: X-Y), timeline grid completely removed for clean appearance, goal indicator balls repositioned to -8px for tight alignment with bar tips
changelog.1.12.5: Fixed: Report header now displays scores directly under team names with period breakdowns (shows all 4 period scores for multi-period games, references game.numPeriods from game setup), timeline grid removed for cleaner look with subtle minute marker lines, goal indicators repositioned closer to bar tips (12px offset), improved header alignment and spacing for professional appearance
changelog.1.12.4: Fixed: Complete game report redesign - timeline chart now displays as ONE unified graph with center-line symmetric design (user team bars grow UP, opponent bars grow DOWN around center line), minute scale (0' to 90') displays across chart, all bars in single container for true unified visualization, goals & cards section converted to simple sequential list format (time - icon - player - assist info), better readability and professional sports app appearance
changelog.1.12.3: Fixed: Timeline chart completely rebuilt - simplified structure with proper bar positioning, clean two-section layout (your team top, opponent bottom), clear minute scale (0' to 90'), bars use gradient coloring (green to light-green for user, red to blue for opponent), proper bar sizing and visibility
changelog.1.12.2: Fixed: Game report header displays team names, timeline chart structure with symmetrical design
changelog.1.12: Enhanced: Game report redesign with symmetrical timeline chart - user team shots display as green bars growing upward, opponent saves display as blue bars growing downward, goals display in separate two-column section (left: your team, right: opponent team), team names now prominently displayed in report header
changelog.1.11.1: Enhanced: Player name capitalization system - all player and team names now stored in uppercase for consistency across all screens and reports, applied capitalization at data entry point (addPlayer, saveEditedPlayer, addNewTeam, saveTeamName, formation setup), seamless report design with unified styling (white backgrounds, subtle borders, no color-coded sections)
changelog.1.10.22: Fixed: native browser drag behavior was still possible on player elements - added dragstart event listener that prevents default to block HTML5 native dragging, added CSS user-select: none and user-drag: none with webkit prefixes to all player elements (.player-number, .player-number-placed, .player-item-draggable) and slot elements (.player-slot, .unavailable-slot) to completely disable dragging and text selection, formation screen now tap-to-select only with zero drag interference
changelog.1.10.19: Fixed: mobile formation/lineup screen tap-to-select now works for all player locations - sidebar bench players, on-field players (player circles), and unavailable slots, added touchstart/touchend event handlers to field slots for mobile detection, improved event target detection in handleTapPlayer to use closest() for reliable element identification, added proper touch event listener cleanup and reattachment when players are moved between sidebar/field/unavailable locations
changelog.1.10.18: Fixed: mobile formation screen layout - bench area players now properly aligned to the left with correct jersey number circle sizing (no ovals), tap-to-select now works reliably on mobile devices (distinguishes tap from drag, ignores accidental taps during drag operations), improved touch support with proper touch-action settings
changelog.1.10.17: Fixed: team setup screen now displays checkboxes consistently on first load and after team switching (removed old trash-can-based delete UI conflict), players now display properly in team setup screen (updated all renderPlayersList calls to use TeamSetupScreen.renderPlayersList), end-of-game reports now correctly show substitutes section with all benched players (calculates substitutes as players not in formation), cleaned up codebase by removing unused methods (PlayerService.findPlayerByJerseyNumber, getAllPlayers, getPlayerCount and GameService.getGameCount), removed old backup files (app.js.backup, app.js.backup_before_formation, attached_assets folder)
changelog.1.10.16: Fixed: report counter on main screen now displays correctly (added updateGameReportCounter and updatePlayerCounter functions), reports screen now shows correct team reports when switching teams (uses getTeamGames instead of appState.games), end-of-game reports enhanced with soccer field formation visualization with player stats overlay, goals/cards now display with game minutes (Player Name 20', 35'), added 'Goals Against' summary line to report header, improved error handling for old reports with fallback to legacy data, new reports now call ReportService.viewReport() for full enhancements
changelog.1.10.15: Fixed: removed icons from statistics and report table data rows (icons now only in header titles as designed), fixed goalkeeper validation to check for 'GK' position (specific to soccer field spot layout, bottom of field), optimized dropToSidebar() to only update removed player in sidebar instead of rebuilding entire sidebar (eliminates weird all-spots-with-names behavior when returning players to bench)
changelog.1.10.14: Fixed: report counter now counts all completed games (was only counting games with actions), restored icons to statistics table headers and data rows (goals, assists, saves, etc), restored icons to game report table headers with abbreviated column names, removed formation player count validation from game setup screen (moved to formation setup), added period validation to game setup (at least 1 period required), game setup validation improved with match type and period checks, formation setup validation now checks: on-field players match match type count, goalkeeper position is filled, total roster can exceed on-field count for benched/unavailable, validateFormationSetup() called from startGameFromFormation()
changelog.1.10.13: Fixed: player names in team setup stats tab now capitalized, team name now stored in game reports (appState.currentGame.teamName) so stats tab can refer to proper reports by team, formation player count validation kept only on formation setup screen (roster can have more players than field positions for substitutes)
changelog.1.10.12: Critical fixes: fixed statistics tab error (removed incorrect appState.players filter from StatisticsService), added formation player count validation (ensures correct # of players for match type), restored player tile status colors (green=starter on field, blue=benched), implemented complete red card filtering (disabled in openPlayerActionDialog, filtered in openAssistSelectionDialog, validated in completeGoalWithAssist), implemented 2 yellows = red automatic conversion logic with 'converted to red card' message, preserved formation player info in currentGame.formationPlayers for status coloring
changelog.1.10.11: Simplified: reverted renderPlayerGrid() to remove unnecessary status class logic (starter/substitute/unavailable) that was overcomplicating the ui, kept focused card class application (yellow-card/red-card) based on player stats, restored simpler cleaner tile rendering
changelog.1.10.10: Fixed: game setup screen no longer requires substitution time when 'timer not needed' is checked, live game player tiles now display color-coded status (starter/substitute/unavailable) and card states (yellow/red), yellow and red card buttons now properly update tile styling and card counters, end of game report now includes yellow and red card statistics in the table
changelog.1.10.9: Fixed: team setup dropdown now properly switches teams by passing event element to handleTeamChange(), player tiles now appear on game tracking screen with renderPlayerGrid() called on screen entry and in startGameFromFormation(), error messages now auto-hide after 5 seconds like success messages
changelog.1.10.8: Fixed: removed +/- buttons from main screen team selector (team management only on team-setup), added black background styling to team-setup screen's team-name section, fixed formation screen unavailable slot tap selection (now detects unavailable source correctly), improved bench spot handling - empty spots stay visible when players placed on field, fixed setupFormation() to create game before showing formation screen (prevents 'no game selected' error), enhanced dropToSidebar() to completely rebuild sidebar with proper event listeners
changelog.1.10.7: Fixed: formation screen sidebar rebuild when players dropped back from field - now properly shows all available players instead of trying to re-enable deleted DOM elements, verified all JavaScript syntax is valid
changelog.1.10.6: Fixed: main screen player counter now updates on team change, team selector moved into black banner line (main and team-setup screens), formation screen unavailable slots are now draggable with event listener reattachment, formation screen bench spots cleared when players placed on field
changelog.1.10.5: Fixed player position capture on creation, separated team player counter ID from main screen counter, added team name banner and team selector to main screen
changelog.1.10.4: Critical fixes: clearAppData now resets multi-team structure, fixed all appState.players references (editPlayer, savePlayerEdit, deletePlayer, recordAction, game tracking), fixed formation screen unavailable slot clearing, added position field to player objects
changelog.1.10.3: Critical fixes: unified player counter on all screens, formation screen player duplication, team management UI reorganization (team selector only on team-setup screen)
changelog.1.10.2: Bug fixes: FormationScreen drag/drop/tap handlers, player counter updates, team switching on all screens, delete team button, 2-team limit
changelog.1.10.1: Bug fixes: handleTeamChange, addNewTeam updateUI, StatisticsService team isolation
changelog.1.10.0: Multi-team functionality - manage distinct teams (U10 men, U9 women, etc)
